text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet doesn't seem to be feeling very
well.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. Just a headache is all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I stayed up studying last night, so that's probably
why.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing for you to worry about. Once I take
some medicine, I'll be right as—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh, geez! This is ticking me off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet laments over her headache.
